## What problem are we solving
<!-- Who is the user, what is the pain, why does it matter? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- The shortest thing we can ship that solves the problem. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Anything you ruled out and why. -->

## Phase / sprint impact
<!-- Is this MVP scope, Phase 2 scope, or a Phase 3 idea (out of current scope)? -->
